description: This Tefal OleoClean Pro FR804040 is a semi-professional deep fryer featuring a unique worldwide patented automatic oil filtration system. Once your cooking is complete and the oil has cooled, the device automatically drains and filters the oil into a storage box below for reuse. This specific 3.5L variant includes a large brushed stainless steel frying basket, a permanent metallic filter within the lid, and an adjustable thermostat. The viewing window allows for easy monitoring, while the fully dismantlable parts ensure hassle-free cleaning in a dishwasher.
features: 2300W power rating for rapid heat-up; 3.5L oil capacity; 1.2kg food capacity; Patented automatic oil filtration system; Adjustable thermostat (150°C to 190°C); Digital timer; Immersed heating element technology; Cool zone technology to prevent food debris burning.
uses: Deep frying chips, fish, doughnuts, tempura, and breaded items with precise temperature control and clean oil management.

accessories.name: Frying Basket
accessories.description: Wire mesh basket with cool-touch handle for submerging and retrieving food.

accessories.name: Oil Storage Box
accessories.description: Integrated container for storing filtered oil beneath the frying unit.

accessories.name: Lid with Viewing Window
accessories.description: Lid featuring a permanent metallic filter and viewing window for monitoring cooking progress.

name: Tefal OleoClean Pro FR804040
